original_statement: what is the total number of points india has scored throughout the rivalry?
mutated_statement: what is the total number of something one side has done throughout the situation?
mutation_analysis: [Entity replacement] + [Object generalization] + [Action verb replacement] + [Context generalization]: Specific country "india"→generic "one side" | measurable "points"→vague "something" | action "has scored"→generic "has done" | relation "rivalry"→vague "situation" (india→one side | points→something | has scored→has done | rivalry→situation)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据日志可见Agent直接对模糊提问做出具体假设并给出数值答案，而未表现出请求澄清或指出不确定性。例如在多次chain/after_refine中出现的simple_query("25")及其说明："Interpreting 'one side' as Pakistan... Summing Pakistan’s wins... Total = 25."（iteration 1/2/3/4/5 的 after_refine 链）。多处critique也指出Agent未经支持地假定“One side”为Pakistan且未用规定的表格操作步骤（critique中有“assumes ‘one side’ refers to Pakistan... which is not explicitly defined”与“invokes an undefined function 'simple_query()'”的批评），并指出Agent非正式地排除了2013年TBA行但没有用select_row等函数执行过滤。综上，Agent没有在judge_thought或critique中承认问题的歧义或请求用户澄清，而是按照自己的理解直接计算并返回具体答案，因此应归类为“无法意识到指令模糊”。
